---
title: "Quarto 2"
author: "Leo Katz"
format: html
execute:
    echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
# Create the visualization
ggplot(data = mpg, aes(x = displ, y = hwy, color = class)) +
  # Add points with some jitter to prevent overlapping and adjust transparency
  geom_jitter(size = 3, alpha = 0.7, width = 0.1) +
  # Add a global trend line showing the negative correlation
  geom_smooth(aes(group = 1), method = "lm", color = "black", 
              linetype = "dashed", se = FALSE, alpha = 0.5) +
  # Use a clean, modern theme
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  # Customize colors using a nice palette
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  # Add meaningful titles and labels
  labs(
    title = "Engine Size vs. Highway Fuel Efficiency",
    subtitle = "Larger engines generally yield lower highway MPG across vehicle classes",
    x = "Engine Displacement (Liters)",
    y = "Highway Miles per Gallon (MPG)",
    color = "Vehicle Class",
    caption = "Data Source: EPA (mpg dataset)"
  ) +
  # Fine-tune theme adjustments
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray40", margin = margin(b = 10)),
    legend.position = "right",
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```
